response.justification: Candidate is a capable senior/staff full-stack engineer with broad polyglot experience, but does not meet the bar for a Principal/Director-level IC role focused on AI strategy. Total experience (~15 years counting freelance) is borderline, but there is no evidence of AI/ML platform leadership, advising strategic customers on AI adoption, or building recognized AI products. Recent AI exposure (MCP tooling at re:cinq) is nascent and not at the scale or seniority this role requires.
strengths: Broad polyglot full-stack background across web, mobile, embedded, and infra
Some recent AI-adjacent work on MCP code generators and agentic workflows
Track record of founding and shipping open-source platforms (GISCollective)
concerns: No demonstrated AI/ML expertise or recognized AI products/platforms
No Director-level or Principal IC scope; experience tops out at Staff/Senior
No evidence of advising strategic customers or driving cloud/AI strategy

key_factors.factor: Lack of AI/ML depth and recognized AI products
Seniority gap vs. Principal/Director IC scope
Broad engineering versatility and OSS founder experience
